title: BP chairman removed over 'serious' conduct concerns
summary: BP's board has removed Chairman Albert Manifold due to serious conduct concerns, with senior independent director Amanda Blanc stating the board was "surprised and disappointed" by the issues. This marks a significant leadership change at the major energy company. The decision reflects serious governance matters at the British petroleum major.
content: Senior independent director Amanda Blanc says the board has been "surprised and disappointed" to learn of the issues.

zh.title: BP主席因'严重'品行问题被免职
zh.summary: BP董事会因严重品行问题撤销了主席艾伯特·曼尼福尔德的职位,独立董事阿曼达·布兰克表示董事会对这些问题感到"惊讶和失望"。这标志着这家主要能源公司的重大领导层变更。该决定反映了英国石油巨头的严重治理问题。

title: BP shares fall after board removes chairman Albert Manifold over 'serious’ conduct concerns
summary: BP's board unanimously voted to remove Chairman Albert Manifold immediately over serious conduct concerns, prompting a decline in the company's stock price. The swift action underscores the severity of the governance issues identified. This represents a major leadership upheaval at the British energy giant.
content: The board of British energy major BP on Tuesday announced it had unanimously decided to remove Chairman Albert Manifold with immediate effect.

zh.title: BP董事长因'严重'品行问题被撤销后股价下跌
zh.summary: BP董事会一致投票立即撤销董事长艾伯特·曼尼福尔德因严重品行问题,导致公司股价下跌。这一迅速行动强调了所发现治理问题的严重性。这代表了英国能源巨头的重大领导层变动。

title: Dow futures rise 200 points on tentative hope U.S.-Iran deal is close: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures rose 200 points amid tentative optimism about a potential U.S.-Iran deal. The S&P 500 climbed 0.9% last week to achieve its longest winning streak since late 2023. Market sentiment shows cautious positivity on possible geopolitical resolution.
content: The S&P 500 climbed 0.9% last week to notch its longest weekly winning streak since late 2023.

zh.title: 道指期货因对美伊协议接近达成抱有初步希望而上涨200点:实时更新
zh.summary: 在对潜在美伊协议抱有初步乐观态度的背景下,美国股指期货上涨200点。标普500指数上周上涨0.9%,创下自2023年末以来最长连胜记录。市场情绪对可能的地缘政治解决方案表现出谨慎乐观。

title: Investors ‘afraid’ to take position on oil, data chiefs say as tankers face potential Hormuz fees
summary: Oil markets are showing investor hesitation as Iran may impose transit fees on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz as part of a U.S. peace deal. The uncertainty over potential charges is keeping traders cautious about taking positions in energy. The concerns reflect broader anxieties about how negotiations could affect global oil trade.
content: Oil markets fear Iran may impose fees on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz as part of any peace deal with the U.S.

zh.title: 投资者对石油"感到害怕"，数据负责人称油轮面临霍尔木兹海峡潜在费用
zh.summary: 石油市场显示投资者犹豫不决，因为伊朗可能对经过霍尔木兹海峡的船只征收过路费，作为美国和平协议的一部分。潜在费用的不确定性使交易员对建立能源头寸持谨慎态度。这些担忧反映了对谈判如何影响全球石油贸易的更广泛焦虑。

title: We're again trimming a stock up 46% last week and 80% since our April initiation
summary: An investment analyst is trimming a position in a stock that has gained 46% in the past week and 80% since April. The strategy reflects a principle of taking profits on parabolic moves rather than pursuing momentum. This demonstrates disciplined portfolio management amid volatile markets.
content: More broadly, we don't buy parabolic moves; we take profits.

zh.title: 我们再次减持一只股票，该股上周上涨46%，自4月启动以来上涨80%
zh.summary: 一位投资分析师正在减持一只股票的头寸，该股在过去一周上涨了46%，自4月以来上涨了80%。这一策略反映了在抛物线走势中获利了结而非追逐动量的原则。这展示了在波动市场中的纪律性投资组合管理。

title: Eli Lilly stock edges higher as company plans nearly $4 billion in vaccine deals
summary: Eli Lilly announced plans for nearly $4 billion in vaccine deals to expand its infectious disease research and development capabilities. The stock edged higher on the news of the strategic expansion. The move positions the pharmaceutical company to diversify its portfolio and grow in new therapeutic areas.
content: The deals are part of Eli Lilly’s effort to expand into infectious disease research and development.

zh.title: 礼来股票小幅上升，公司计划进行近40亿美元的疫苗交易
zh.summary: 礼来公司宣布计划进行近40亿美元的疫苗交易，以扩展其传染病研发能力。在战略扩展的消息发布后，该股小幅上升。此举定位这家制药公司以多样化其投资组合并在新的治疗领域实现增长。

title: Global oil prices climb back toward $100 a barrel after U.S. launches new strikes in southern Iran despite potential deal
summary: Global oil prices are climbing back toward $100 per barrel following new U.S. military strikes in southern Iran, despite ongoing peace negotiations. The escalating military action contradicts hopes for diplomatic resolution. The geopolitical tensions are creating significant uncertainty in energy markets.
content: Global oil prices were creeping back toward the $100 a barrel mark on Tuesday.

zh.title: 美国向伊朗南部发起新军事打击后全球油价回升至近100美元/桶，尽管存在潜在协议
zh.summary: 美国向伊朗南部发动新军事打击后，全球油价正回升至每桶100美元附近，尽管和平谈判仍在进行中。不断升级的军事行动与外交解决的希望相悖。地缘政治紧张局势正在能源市场造成重大不确定性。

title: Ferry frustrations and housing concerns in Gorey
summary: Business owners in Gorey, including café operators, are facing increased costs due to new freight pricing on ferry services. The pricing changes are creating frustration among local merchants trying to maintain operations. Housing affordability concerns are also emerging in the community.
content: Café owners and others in Gorey tell the BBC a new freight pricing model is driving up costs.

zh.title: Gorey地区的渡轮服务困扰和住房问题
zh.summary: Gorey的企业主（包括咖啡馆经营者）由于渡轮服务新运费定价而面临成本增加。定价变化引发了当地商人的不满，他们努力维持业务运营。社区中住房可负担性问题也浮出水面。

title: UK gilt yields retreat from multi-decade highs as political drama mellows, rate hike expectations ease
summary: UK gilt yields have retreated from multi-decade highs as political uncertainty eases and rate hike expectations moderate. The 10-year gilt yield fell to 4.85% as bond markets resumed trading after a bank holiday. Easing political tensions are supporting a decline in expected borrowing costs.
content: As bond markets returned from a bank holiday on Tuesday morning, the yield on the benchmark 10-year bond stood at 4.85%.

zh.title: 随着政治局势平静、加息预期缓和，英国吉利债收益率从数十年高位回落
zh.summary: 随着政治不确定性缓解和加息预期温和，英国吉利债收益率从数十年高位回落。在银行假期后债券市场恢复交易期间，10年期吉利债收益率下降至4.85%。政治紧张局势缓解正在支撑预期借款成本的下降。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Micron, Pershing Square, Dell, Occidental & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on major stocks including Nvidia, Apple, Micron, and Occidental on Tuesday. These analyst recommendations signal shifts in conviction on key technology and energy stocks. The calls provide market guidance as investors navigate ongoing volatility.
content: Here are Tuesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周二最大的分析师评级：英伟达、苹果、美光、Pershing Square、戴尔、Occidental等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周二对英伟达、苹果、美光和Occidental等主要股票发表了重要评级。这些分析师建议反映了对关键科技和能源股票看法的转变。这些评级为投资者应对持续波动提供了市场指引。

title: Bill Ackman's stock is off to a great start since its debut. But analysts are leery from here
summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square stock (PS) and its affiliated closed-end fund (PSUS) have had a strong debut on the New York Stock Exchange. However, analysts remain cautious about future performance following the early momentum. The skepticism suggests concerns about valuation sustainability post-launch.
content: The stock, which trades under the ticker PS, debuted alongside closed-end fund Pershing Square USA, or PSUS, on the New York Stock Exchange.

zh.title: 比尔·阿克曼的股票上市以来开局良好。但分析师对后续持谨慎态度
zh.summary: 比尔·阿克曼的Pershing Square股票（PS）及其关联的封闭式基金（PSUS）在纽约证交所上市表现强劲。然而在初期涨势之后，分析师对未来表现仍持谨慎态度。这种怀疑反映了对上市后估值可持续性的担忧。

title: BP ousts another top executive over claims brought to the board
summary: BP's board unanimously removed Chairman Albert Manifold and a company director with immediate effect over serious claims brought to the board. This major leadership overhaul indicates significant governance concerns at the energy company. The swift dual removal reflects the severity of the issues identified.
content: BP said its board unanimously decided to remove Albert Manifold as chair, as well as a director, with immediate effect.

zh.title: BP因董事会收到的指控罢免高管
zh.summary: BP董事会因收到的严重指控，以全票一致决议立即罢免了董事长Albert Manifold和一名公司董事。这次重大的领导层变更表明该能源公司存在重大治理问题。这两项迅速的罢免决定反映了所发现问题的严重性。

title: Wells Fargo to offer mortgage incentives on 3D printed homes with Icon
summary: Wells Fargo is offering mortgage incentives on Icon's 3D-printed homes, providing a 50 basis point lender credit to qualifying borrowers. The partnership reflects growing interest in innovative construction technologies for residential real estate. This initiative positions both companies at the forefront of housing innovation.
content: Wells Fargo will provide a 50 basis point lender credit to buyers of Icon homes using its mortgages.

zh.title: 富国银行为Icon 3D打印房屋提供抵押贷款激励措施
zh.summary: 富国银行为Icon的3D打印房屋提供抵押贷款激励措施,为符合条件的借款人提供50个基点的贷款人信用额度。该合作反映了人们对住宅房地产创新建筑技术日益增长的兴趣。这一举措使两家公司处于住房创新的最前沿。

title: This bear market signal Wall Street ignores is putting your money at risk right now
summary: Veteran trader Steve Burns warns of a bear market signal that Wall Street is overlooking, which he argues poses significant risk to investor portfolios. He identifies three "deadly stock-market sins" destroying returns and warns of potential 50% declines. The analysis suggests current market conditions may be more fragile than consensus expectations.
content: Veteran trader Steve Burns prepares for a 50% decline and exposes the 3 “deadly stock-market sins” destroying portfolios.

zh.title: 华尔街忽视的熊市信号正在威胁你的资金安全
zh.summary: 资深交易员Steve Burns警告华尔街正在忽视的熊市信号,他认为这对投资组合构成重大风险。他指出了三种"致命的股市罪恶"正在摧毁收益,并警告可能出现50%的跌幅。该分析表明当前市场条件可能比市场共识预期更加脆弱。

title: Here’s the defensive stock-market trade that works no matter where bond yields end up
summary: JPMorgan identifies low-volatility stocks as an effective defensive trade that performs well regardless of bond yield direction. These stocks have underperformed year-to-date but appear positioned for a breakout. The strategy offers portfolio protection across various macroeconomic scenarios.
content: JPMorgan says low-volatility stocks have underperformed this year, are ready to bust out no matter what the macro backdrop looks like.

zh.title: 无论债券收益率走向如何,这种防守性股票交易策略都能奏效
zh.summary: 摩根大通指出低波动性股票是一种有效的防守性交易,无论债券收益率方向如何,都能表现良好。这些股票今年迄今为止表现不佳,但似乎已准备好突破。该策略在各种宏观经济情景下都能提供投资组合保护。

title: European stocks open mixed following U.S. strikes on Iran, mixed messages on peace talks
summary: European stocks opened mixed Tuesday as traders monitored Middle East and Ukraine developments. The uncertainty around U.S.-Iran tensions and conflicting peace signals created volatility in market sentiment.
content: European stocks opened mixed on Tuesday, as traders watched developments in the Middle East and Ukraine.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗的打击后欧洲股市开盘走混，和平谈判信号混合
zh.summary: 欧洲股市周二开盘走混，交易员监测中东和乌克兰局势发展。美国-伊朗紧张局势的不确定性和相互矛盾的和平信号造成了市场情绪的波动。

title: EU plans to fine Google high triple-digit million euro sum, Handelsblatt reports
summary: The EU is planning to impose a massive fine on Google for violating its Digital Markets Act, marking the largest penalty under the legislation designed to rein in big tech's market dominance.
content: The fine would be the largest penalty the EU has imposed for a breach of its Digital Markets Act, which aims to curb the power of big tech companies.

zh.title: 据《商报》报道，欧盟计划对谷歌处以高达三位数百万欧元的罚款
zh.summary: 欧盟计划因谷歌违反《数字市场法》而对其处以巨额罚款，这是该旨在遏制大科技公司市场主导地位的法律下的最大罚款。

title: Ferrari's electric ambitions with the Luce launch
summary: Ferrari unveiled its first fully electric vehicle, the Luce, co-designed with former Apple designer Jony Ive, featuring dual electric motors and 0-100 km/h acceleration in 2.5 seconds. The five-seater marks Ferrari's entry into the electric car market.
content: Ferrari has unveiled its first fully electric car, co-designed by former Apple chief designer Jony Ive. The 'Ferrari Luce' is a five-seater, powered by an electric engine on each wheel - and is able to reach 100 kilometres per hour in just 2-and-a-half seconds. CNBC's Charlotte Reed speaks to the CEO, Benedetto Vigna.

zh.title: 法拉利通过Luce电动车推出展现其电动雄心
zh.summary: 法拉利推出其首款完全电动车型Luce，由前苹果设计师乔尼·艾夫联合设计，配备双电动马达，0-100公里/小时加速时间为2.5秒。这款五座车型标志着法拉利进入电动汽车市场。

title: 'An £8,000 debt pushed me to breaking point'
summary: A Bradford resident shares his struggle with significant personal debt, urging others to seek help when facing financial hardship. His story highlights the psychological toll of debt and the importance of support resources.
content: A Bradford man who has struggled with debt urges others to reach out for help.

zh.title: "一笔8000英镑的债务把我逼到了崩溃的边缘"
zh.summary: 一位布拉德福德居民分享了他与巨额个人债务的斗争，敦促其他人在面临经济困难时寻求帮助。他的故事突出了债务的心理代价和支持资源的重要性。

title: Bank holiday sun boosts South West tourism
summary: Sunny weather during a bank holiday drove a tourism surge in Devon and Cornwall, with business owners crediting favorable conditions for increased customer traffic. The bright conditions demonstrated weather's significant impact on tourism-dependent regional economies.
content: Business owners in Devon and Cornwall describe how "the sun just brings everybody out".

zh.title: 银行假日阳光促进西南地区旅游业
zh.summary: 银行假日期间的晴朗天气促进了德文郡和康沃尔郡的旅游热潮，商业主人将客流增加归功于有利的天气条件。明媚的天气表明了天气对旅游业依赖型地区经济的重大影响。

title: U.S. conducts 'self-defense strikes' in Iran as Trump pushes for peace deal
summary: The U.S. carried out targeted strikes on Iranian military sites including missile facilities and boats attempting to lay mines, even as the Trump administration pursues diplomatic peace negotiations. The military action and diplomatic efforts represent a complex balancing act in U.S.-Iran relations.
content: Targets included missile launch sites and Iranian boats attempting to emplace mines.

zh.title: 特朗普推进和平协议之际，美国在伊朗实施"自卫打击"
zh.summary: 美国对包括导弹设施和试图布设水雷的船只在内的伊朗军事目标进行了精准打击，而特朗普政府同时在进行外交和平谈判。军事行动和外交努力在美伊关系中体现了一种复杂的平衡行为。

title: Ferrari unveils first fully electric car
summary: Ferrari launched its first fully electric vehicle, the Luce model, despite pressure from Chinese EV competitors, though the design generated mixed social media reactions. The move signals traditional luxury automakers adapting to the electric vehicle transition.
content: The new Luce model has divided opinion on social media, and comes despite intense pressure from Chinese EV makers.

zh.title: 法拉利推出首款全电动汽车
zh.summary: 尽管面临中国电动汽车竞争对手的压力，法拉利推出了其首款全电动汽车Luce车型，但该设计在社交媒体上引发了不同的反应。这一举动标志着传统豪华汽车制造商正在适应电动汽车转型。

title: Oil prices mixed as U.S. military strikes against Iran cloud Middle East peace prospects
summary: U.S. military strikes against Iran are creating uncertainty in Middle East peace negotiations and affecting oil prices. The Trump administration says negotiations are proceeding well but warned that military action could resume if talks collapse.
content: Donald Trump also said negotiations with Iran were "proceeding nicely," but cautioned that the U.S. could resume military action if discussions were to collapse.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗军事打击致油价波动，中东和平前景蒙阴
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗的军事打击在中东和平谈判中造成不确定性，影响油价。特朗普政府表示谈判进展顺利，但警告如果谈判破裂，可能恢复军事行动。

title: South Korea's Kospi hits fresh record as hopes of U.S.-Iran breakthrough rise
summary: South Korea's Kospi stock index reached a fresh record as optimism grows around U.S.-Iran peace negotiations. Asia-Pacific markets are broadly higher, driven by investor confidence in a potential diplomatic breakthrough.
content: Asia-Pacific markets were set to open broadly higher Tuesday, amid hopes for a breakthrough in the U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.

zh.title: 美伊突破希望上升，韩国科斯皮指数创下新高
zh.summary: 随着美伊和平谈判乐观情绪增长，韩国科斯皮股票指数创下新高。亚太地区市场普遍上涨，由投资者对潜在外交突破的信心推动。
